2606.27981.title: ToxiREX: A Dataset on Toxic REasoning in ConteXt
2606.27981.paper_summary: We introduce a new, contextual, multilingual dataset called ToxiREX: Toxic REasoning in ConteXt. The dataset consists of threads of Reddit comments and structured characterizations of what the comments imply, following a systematic toxic reasoning schema developed in a previous paper. Using the schema allows us to capture and explain implicit and context-dependent toxicity, while supporting mappings to existing toxicity taxonomies. The dataset includes comments in six languages (English, Arabic, Turkish, Spanish, German, and Dutch), collected from posts connected to specific major events (e.g. the 2023 Turkey earthquakes; the Russian invasion of Ukraine). We describe the context-preserving preprocessing of the threads. We create a training set of 125 thousand comments which is annotated by a commercially available LLM, and a test set of just under three thousand comments that is annotated by native speakers. We show that apparent disagreements in the test set annotations often reflect defensible alternative interpretations rather than noise. Finally, we provide baseline results by prompting and fine-tuning language models. To produce these results, we develop evaluation strategies for our hierarchical, schema-based predictions. While models perform better than random, there remains a lot of room for improvement, showing the task to be challenging. ToxiREX is the first dataset to simultaneously incorporate multiple languages, conversational context, and implicit toxicity, while using the toxic reasoning schema for rich, structured annotations. Dataset available at: https://github.com/cltl/toxirex
2606.27981.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹了一個新的、具上下文的多語言數據集，名為 ToxiREX：上下文中的有毒推理。該數據集由 Reddit 評論的串聯和對這些評論所暗示內容的結構化描述組成，遵循在先前論文中開發的系統性有毒推理架構。使用該架構使我們能夠捕捉和解釋隱含的、依賴於上下文的有毒性，同時支持與現有有毒性分類法的映射。該數據集包含六種語言的評論（英語、阿拉伯語、土耳其語、西班牙語、德語和荷蘭語），這些評論來自與特定重大事件相關的帖子（例如 2023 年土耳其地震；俄羅斯入侵烏克蘭）。我們描述了對這些串聯的上下文保留預處理。我們創建了一個包含 125,000 條評論的訓練集，這些評論由商業可用的 LLM 進行標註，以及一個包含不到 3,000 條評論的測試集，這些評論由母語者進行標註。我們展示了測試集標註中顯然的分歧通常反映了可辯護的替代解釋，而不是噪音。最後，我們通過提示和微調語言模型提供基線結果。為了產生這些結果，我們為我們的層次結構、基於架構的預測開發了評估策略。雖然模型的表現優於隨機，但仍有很大的改進空間，顯示這項任務具有挑戰性。ToxiREX 是第一個同時包含多種語言、對話上下文和隱含有毒性的數據集，同時使用有毒推理架構進行豐富的結構化標註。數據集可在以下網址獲得：https://github.com/cltl/toxirex
2606.27981.author: Stefan F. Schouten et.al.
2606.27981.authors: Stefan F. Schouten, Ilia Markov, Piek Vossen
